full_vault.description: Private/full local vault checkout with raw, wiki, system, and generated release evidence surfaces available.

source_package_extract.description: Clean extract of the public release source package; generated full-vault artifacts are intentionally absent.

public_or_partial_checkout.description: Public mirror or partial checkout without full-vault private corpus and generated evidence surfaces.

check-clean.reason: check-clean includes release evidence checks that require full-vault generated artifacts.

release-distribution-zip.reason: release-distribution-zip builds a new source archive from full-vault state; source-package extracts already contain release-archive-self-description.json and must not replay packaging inside themselves.

release-smoke.reason: release-smoke packages and replays the full source archive profile, which requires full-vault corpus and release policy context.

release-evidence-closeout.reason: release-evidence-closeout is a compatibility alias for release-evidence-converge and refreshes generated release evidence that is intentionally absent from source-package extracts.

release-evidence-converge.reason: release-evidence-converge refreshes generated release evidence that is intentionally absent from source-package extracts.

release-verify-current.reason: release-verify-current checks full-vault generated release evidence and finality without mutating canonical report artifacts.

release-sealed-verify.reason: release-sealed-verify checks existing sealed release evidence against a materialized source ZIP without rebuilding the distribution package.

release-builder-full.reason: release-builder-full is the full-vault release builder lane and depends on release-evidence-converge.

release-run-ready.reason: release-run-ready verifies the current committed tree and writes build/release sidecar authority evidence.
